assistantDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this assistant does
systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a helpful AI assistant...
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
typeToCreateGroup: Type to create a new group
definesBehavior: Defines the assistant's behavior and personality (sent as system message)
prependedToUserMessages: This will be prepended to user messages
selectAiModel: Select the AI model that will power this assistant
toolsDescription: Select which tools and MCP servers this assistant can use. These tools will be available when using this assistant in conversations.
enableToolInSettings: Enable this tool in Settings first
noToolsAvailable2: No tools available. Enable built-in tools or configure MCP servers in Settings.
skillsDescription: Select which skills this assistant should have. Skills add specialized instructions and may require specific tools to function. Place SKILL.md files in ~/.chatshell/skills/ to create custom skills.
enableSkillInSettings: Enable this skill in Settings first
createDirectory: Create a directory under ~/.chatshell/skills/ with a SKILL.md file to get started.
defaultSystemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant.
noSkillsAvailable: No skills available yet. Create a directory under ~/.chatshell/skills/ with a SKILL.md file to get started.
createDescription: Configure your new AI assistant with custom prompts and settings.
